name: Eevee
tagline: Eight evolutions. Infinite cards. The cutest investment vehicle on the planet.

buckets.label: Grail Watch
buckets.blurb: Gold Star Eevees and Eeveelution VMAX Alt Art rainbows — the chase set of the modern era.

buckets.label: Vintage Eevee
buckets.blurb: Jungle and e-Card era Eevees — affordable entry into vintage.

buckets.label: Eeveelution V / VMAX Alt Arts
buckets.blurb: Evolving Skies Eeveelution VMAX Alt Arts — the most beloved modern set ever printed.

buckets.label: Eevee ex / SIR
buckets.blurb: Scarlet & Violet era Eevee + Eeveelution ex SIRs. Umbreon SIR is a wallet-killer.

buckets.label: Eevee Heroes / Japanese
buckets.blurb: Eevee Heroes (Japanese) is the source set for all the Eeveelution VMAX Alt Arts.

buckets.label: Eevee PSA 10
buckets.blurb: Graded gem-mint Eevees and Eeveelutions. Umbreon PSA 10 is a household name.
